title: cyclophorus rupestris
intro: Cyclophorus rupestris, also known as the rock Cyclophorus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclophorus rupestris include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Cyclophorus rupestris is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements and teas.
